meaning: n.{板}(投手投出的)外弧线球
examples: Plunkett bowled a perfect outswinger at Ricky Ponting, who edged to Strauss at slip.
The 21-year-old drove loosely at an outswinger from Dimitri Mascarenhas and edged to Nic Pothas behind the stumps for a duck.
Wasim jaffer (12) was the only one to miss out, edging an outswinger from Robin Martin Jenkins in the 17th over.
